rules.rule: Real scanners are additive upgrades, not replacements for deterministic stdlib fallback baselines.
Network/package-manager install is forbidden unless governed install profile, BTS, pre-action, and HITL/budget gates allow it.
Scanner unavailable is WARN if fallback baseline exists; BLOCK if no fallback baseline exists.
Semgrep auto/config registry use must record metrics/privacy mode and may require no-network or metrics-off profile in restricted contexts.
Any zero-tolerance scanner finding blocks CDR acceptance.

why: CDR Stage 2-7 includes reconstructed artifacts and Stage 8-10 are support-only; a new authority export should happen after scanner adapter profiles and future real scanner smoke are stable or explicitly approved.
